title: Delete ALL Your Indicators, and Use Only THIS One! [Perfect for Scalping]
author: SoheilPKO
summary_bullets: This indicator is designed for scalpers.
I want to teach you a very accurate trading strategy based on this indicator.
All right, on TradingView platform, here we click on indicators and we search scalping pullback.
This one, which is written by just uncle L.
All right, this is the indicator.
And as you can see, it's overlaid on the price chart.
Let me explain what we have here.
And then I will teach you the trading strategy.
This blue line here is an EMA with length of 200.
We have this green line here, which is an EMA with length of 89.

extracted_rules: If we go to the settings of the indicator here, we can turn on the slow EMA, which is an EMA with length of 600.
And the best opportunity is when there is a pullback.
And if the price goes lower than this, it is okay.
So we could enter a long position at this point with the stop plus below the channel and profit target at 1.5 risk to reward ratio.
Deeper pullbacks can give you more probability if you have proper confirmation.
And when we check RSI, we can see that RSI line went below the centerline.

When the RSI line closes back above the centerline and also above the moving average line for more confirmation, which is the case here, this can tell us that the pullback ended and there is a high potential for the price to advance more.
And then when the price turns to the direction of the trend, it shows these arrows, you shouldn't trade only based on these arrows, because they are not always correct.
And in practice, we could enter a long possession at this point with the stop loss below the channel and profit target at 1.5 risk to reward ratio.
The pullback only means when before that, like this case here, the price is above the channel clearly.
We only take a trade when there is a clear trend in the market.
I explained how you identify a trend when the price isn't an uptrend.
When the price is below the price action channel, the channel is below the green EMA and the green EMA is below the blue EMA.
Now we want to find a good trading opportunity to enter a trade and that is when a pullback happens in the market.
We want a pullback of the price at least to the price action channel and if it goes higher, it is okay as long as the conditions of our first step are not broken.

So the cell signal here is confirmed and in practice we could enter a short position at this point with the stop plus above the channel or above the pullback and profit target at 1.5 risk to reward ratio.
Although this trading strategy is very accurate, but without risk management, you don't have any chance to execute this trading strategy profitably.
Losing possessions are always part of the game and if they are not managed properly, you will lose your trading account sooner or later.
One percent role risk management is the best risk management strategy that you can use in your trading system.
The link is also placed in the description and I highly recommend you to watch it because without a proper risk management strategy, you cannot become a consistently profitable trader.
